# SolarPanel

RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::SolarPanel;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        SolarPanel { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
solar panel, solar, panel, sun, energy, electricity, light

## Categories
home, science, sustainability, weather
